sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

tier_notes: T1 designation appears to be qualitative/descriptive only. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF landing page) contain no numerical physics parameters, movement values, gravity constants, jump physics, or sub-pixel system documentation. Game is described as featuring a fast 3D engine designed for speed, but specific physics values are not documented in accessible sources.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Wolfenstein 3D article (gameplay and general design description)
extraction_note: No quantitative physics data found in provided sources. TCRF source link did not contain extractable technical parameters. Recommend consulting: game source code (released 1995), reverse-engineering documentation, or technical post-mortems for specific movement physics values.
